# OpenMark

> Personal newsletter and knowledge graph from Ahmad Adi. Weekly issues on AI agents, retrieval-augmented generation, knowledge graphs, and the modern engineering stack. Sourced from a curated archive of ~13,000 bookmarks.

OpenMark publishes weekly newsletter issues plus daily LinkedIn posts. Issues are written from a Neo4j Graph RAG store with 1024-dim pplx-embed vectors; every claim cites a real URL.

## Content

- [Issues archive](/issues/): Complete list of all newsletter issues
- [RSS feed](/rss.xml): Subscribe via your reader
- [Subscribe by email](/subscribe/): Weekly email digest

## Topics covered

- AI agent architectures (LangChain v1, sub-agent patterns, middleware stacks)
- Retrieval-augmented generation (vector + graph hybrid, embedding choices)
- Knowledge graphs (Neo4j, Cypher, Louvain communities, SIMILAR_TO edges)
- The modern engineering stack (Foundry-routed LLMs, MCP, structured tool use)

## Source code

- [OpenMark repository](https://github.com/OthmanAdi/OpenMark): The orchestrator, sub-agents, and publish pipeline that produces this newsletter
